scripts.dev: npm run build -w @pulsewatch/core && concurrently -n api,worker,web -c blue,magenta,green "npm:dev -w @pulsewatch/api" "npm:dev -w @pulsewatch/worker" "npm:dev -w @pulsewatch/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @pulsewatch/core && npm run build -w @pulsewatch/api && npm run build -w @pulsewatch/worker && npm run build -w @pulsewatch/web
